title: Odisha Govt Restricts Outdoor Labour Work from 11 AM to 3 PM Amid Heatwave - businessnewsthisweek.com
full_text:
Bhubaneswar, May 25 (BNP): In view of the prevailing heatwave conditions and rising temperatures across the state, the Odisha government has imposed restrictions on outdoor work for labourers between 11 AM and 3 PM to protect workers from heat-related illnesses. The directive applies to construction activities and other outdoor labour-intensive work across Odisha.
Representational image
As part of the preventive measures, authorities have directed employers and contractors to ensure adequate drinking water, shaded rest areas, and periodic breaks for workers during working hours. The initiative aims to minimise the risk of heatstroke, dehydration, and other heat-related health complications, particularly among vulnerable labourers exposed to extreme weather conditions.
